prompt:
[Spark MINI 2] [iOS] Unable to control looper via App (BT Audio SSID?)



重要詳細資料
描述

Environments
Spark MINI 2 FW version 3.2.1.90
iOS Spark App Version 4.5.4.96

Reproduce steps
Turn on Spark MINI 2 and connect to both Audio and Tone Control

Go to Music page and tap on Simple or Groove Looper

Expected Result
Opens Looper Page

Actual Result
Dialog box shows “Connect to Spark Audio”

Could be because “Spark MINI 2 Audio” SSID has not been white listed

Acow Li

2026年7月21日 下午6:24
@Ken Lee Hi 學長請協助確認 BLE manufacturerData 裡面有照正確的格式帶 A2DP 的 Bluetooth Address

相關資訊可以參考 SA-1497: [FW] 確認 Bluetooth Audio 不能辨別的問題
Done
  [FW] 確認 Bluetooth Audio 不能辨別的問題



重要詳細資料
描述

這邊列出 Android 看到的情況：

BLE 連線時會拿到 manufacturerSpecificData ，key = 5d29, value = 02 22 7a 28 c3 e5 ab f8 00 

實際上該 Spark2 的 Bluetooth Audio address 是：F8:AB:E5:C3:28:7A

依照 App 目前轉換邏輯，會變成 00:F8:AB:E5:C3:28，因為 data 最後面多了 00

Acow Li

2024年6月19日 下午1:23
順帶一提，我原本 ESP32 FW 是裝 20240530wifi_and_bt_core_on_esp32.bin，可以正常的辨識 Bluetooth Audio。是從更新到 rev375 才變得多這個 00 而認不出來。



thinking face
1



LioChen

2024年6月20日 上午9:06
20240530wifi_and_bt_core_on_esp32.bin
是 Local build 與 feature/looper-project-command 相同






Alice Chan

2024年6月26日 下午3:16
(已編輯)
Root cause : 

Manufacturer length not correct

The BT audio MAC saved in ESP32 is \0\0\0\0\0\0 , 無法復現無法繼續追查原因

Solution : 

   1. Fix the length

If the BT audio mac address is  \0\0\0\0\0\0 , again get from STM32

 

ESP32 MR merged, 麻煩 @Ken Hung  幫忙轉給相關人員安排測試

另外手邊測試的 STM32 firmware 為 spark-ii-fw-2.0.1.172.bin, 硬體為 Gen2 PVT , DVT

 

cc @Ken Lee 



thumbs up
1




Ken Hung

2024年6月27日 上午12:50
Can be verified using ESP32 firmware rev377






kai chang

2024年7月3日 下午4:52
fixed in esp32 fw rev377

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw 2>/dev/null && echo "=== spark-mini-ii-fw exists ===" && ls -la && echo "" && echo "=== git submodules ===" && cat .gitmodules 2>/dev/null
cd /d/mybot/git && echo "=== repos on disk ===" && ls -la && echo "" && echo "=== search for esp32 wifi/bt repos ===" && ls -d */ 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "esp32|wifi|bt|core"
input.description: List all repos, find ESP32 wifi/bt firmware repo

input.command: echo "=== pg-spark product.yaml / context ===" && cat pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt/product.yaml 2>/dev/null; cat pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt/product-context/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo ""; echo "=== which mentions mini ==="; grep -rilE "mini" pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt/*.yaml pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt/*.md 2>/dev/null | head
input.description: Check pg-spark-esp32 product context for Mini2

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/git
echo "===== manufacturer[] in OLDER repo (wifi-and-bt-core-on-esp32) ====="
grep -n -A3 "uint8_t manufacturer\[\]" wifi-and-bt-core-on-esp32/components/ble/ble.c
echo ""
echo "===== manufacturer_len line in OLDER repo ====="
grep -n "manufacturer_len" wifi-and-bt-core-on-esp32/components/ble/ble.c
echo ""
echo "===== device name / product target: pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt ====="
grep
input.description: Compare manufacturer[] in both repos, find product targets

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/git
echo "===== who WRITES nvs storage/mac in pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt ====="
grep -rniE "nvs_set_blob.*mac|set_blob.*\"mac\"|\"mac\"" pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt/components pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt/main 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo ""
echo "===== a2dp / bt classic address source ====="
grep -rniE "a2dp|bt_a2dp|esp_bt_dev_get_address|bd_addr|audio.*mac|get_mac" pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt/components
input.description: Trace NVS mac write, A2DP source, repo identity

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/git/pg-spark-esp32-wifi-bt
echo "===== cb91660 full metadata + diff ====="
git show cb91660 --stat --format="%H%nAuthor:%an%nDate:%ad%n%n%s%n%n%b" 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo ""
echo "===== diff of cb91660 (ble.c / advertising / Gen2 parts only) ====="
git show cb91660 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "^\+\+\+|^---|Gen2|manufacturer|0x02|0x22|adv|GENII|GENI|advertise|dev_name|Spark" | head -40
input.description: Inspect cb91660 fix commit diff and date

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw
echo "===== STM32 handler for get_bt_mac_address / BT audio addr ====="
grep -rniE "get_bt_mac|bt_mac_address|bt_audio.*addr|a2dp.*addr|audio.*mac|bd_addr|GET_BT_MAC" Core Source Middlewares 2>/dev/null | grep -viE "\.map:|Debug/" | head -25
echo ""
echo "===== search PGSysEx / hwcmd for the mac command def ====="
grep -rniE "get_bt_mac|bt_mac_address|BT_MAC" Impor
input.description: Find STM32 get_bt_mac_address handler in spark-mini-ii-fw

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw
echo "===== get_mac_string implementation ====="
grep -rniE "get_mac_string" Source Import 2>/dev/null | grep -v "\.map" | head
echo ""
echo "===== BleCmdHandler get_bt_mac_address_callback context (2360-2375) ====="
sed -n '2360,2375p' Source/Interfaces/BleCmdHandler.cpp

cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw
echo "===== WB2853.h full ====="
cat Source/Components/WB2853.h 2>/dev/null | head -200
echo ""
echo "===== where is _mac written? (WB2853 / set_mac) ====="
grep -rniE "_mac\b|set_mac|MAX_BT_MAC_LENGTH|WB2853" Source Import 2>/dev/null | grep -viE "\.map|Debug/" | head -30
input.description: Read WB2853.h and find where _mac is populated

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/git/spark-mini-ii-fw
echo "===== find WB2853.cpp ====="
find Source -iname "WB2853.cpp" 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "===== get_mac_addr impl + _mac write (in WB2853.cpp) ====="
WB=$(find Source -iname "WB2853.cpp" | head -1)
grep -n -A6 "void WB2853::get_mac_addr" "$WB" 2>/dev/null
echo "--- where _mac is written (memcpy into _mac / BTCMD..MAC handling) ---"
grep -n -B2 -A4 "_mac" "$WB" 2
input.description: Read WB2853 get_mac_addr impl, _mac write, and call timing
